zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Taillebois於大約1050年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內塔爾波易斯時，她的父親Ralf de Taillebois32歲，母親Azeline Ries31歲。她於1070年之前與Hugh de Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1124年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Taillebois was born about 1050, in Taillebois, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Ralf de Taillebois, was 32 and her mother, Azeline Ries, was 31. She married Hugh de Beauchamp before 1070. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1124, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Taillebois est née environ 1050, à Taillebois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Ralf de Taillebois, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Azeline Ries, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Beauchamp avant 1070. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1124, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Tailleboisが約1050年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンティイレボイスで生まれた時，父Ralf de Tailleboisは32歳，母Azeline Riesは31歳であった。1070年以前にHugh de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1124年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Taillebois(이)가 대략 1050년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 테이레보이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralf de Taillebois(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Azeline Ries(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1070년 이전 Hugh de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1124년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Taillebois родилась около 1050 г. в местности теиллебоис, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Ralf de Taillebois было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Azeline Ries, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Beauchamp перед 1070 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1124 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.
